news.t: The Most Compelling ETF Launches in Q2
Franklin Expands ETF Offerings Into the CLO Market
Franklin Templeton Launches YCLO, an Actively Managed Investment Grade CLO ETF

overview.description: The Franklin BSP CLO ETF (YCLO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital preservation and current income through investments in collateralized loan obligations (CLOs) of any maturity that are rated BBB-/Baa3 or higher. The fund may invest up to 5% of its portfolio in below-investment-grade CLO debt tranches. YCLO was launched on Jun 2, 2026 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
